records.ety: [OE. endetten, F. endetter; pref. en- (L. in) + F. dette debt. See Debt.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Indebted; p. pr. & vb. n. Indebting.]

defs: To bring into debt; to place under obligation; -- chiefly used in the participle indebted.
quotes: Thy fortune hath indebted thee to none.
